response.text:

rationale: Your SoC (43%) is below my minimum sharing threshold (50%), and my current belief prioritizes survival—I cannot share without risking my own DoD floor over the remaining 10.5 hours.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
